hero.headline: Hire Elite Brazilian Tech Talent for Your U.S. Company
hero.sub: DEXO connects U.S. companies with highly qualified tech professionals from Brazil — faster, smarter, and more cost-effective than traditional hiring.

about.headline: 8+ Years Connecting Global Tech Teams
about.desc: DEXO is a global recruitment consultancy specialized in connecting U.S. companies with top-tier Brazilian tech talent. With over 8 years of international recruitment experience, we understand what great looks like.

services.headline: How We Help You Scale
services.rec_desc: We identify, vet, and present the best tech talent for your open positions. From Salesforce to full-stack — we find who you need.
services.out_desc: Build dedicated tech teams that work as an extension of your company. Flexible engagement models with full support.

process.headline: A Rigorous Selection Process
process.sub: Every candidate is validated before you meet them.
process.s1_desc: Deep assessment of technical skills by our senior tech team.
process.s2_desc: Professional English proficiency evaluation for U.S. team communication.
process.s4_desc: Final interview with you. You only meet candidates who passed every step.

value.headline: The Smarter Way to Hire
value.i1_d: Pre-vetted senior tech professionals from Brazil's best talent pool.
value.i2_d: World-class engineers at a fraction of U.S. market rates.
value.i3_d: Our process cuts time-to-hire dramatically. No endless screening.
value.i4_d: Rigorous vetting means you only meet truly ready candidates.
value.i5_d: Every placement follows a validated methodology. Consistent results.
value.i6_d: We stay with you through onboarding and beyond.

diff.headline: How We Work With You
diff.d1_d: For every open position, we present at least 3 qualified candidates. We keep sending profiles until you find the right fit.
diff.d2_d: When you fill your second position with DEXO, you receive a percentage discount. Building a long-term partnership pays off.

form.headline: Ready to Hire Smarter?
form.sub: Fill out the form and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
form.min_message: Please provide more details (at least 10 characters)
form.status_success: 🚀 Message sent! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
form.status_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

jobs_page.headline: Join Global Tech Teams
jobs_page.sub: Work with U.S. companies remotely. Competitive pay, world-class teams.
jobs_page.no_jobs: No positions available at the moment. Check back soon!

expertise.domains_desc: We provide validated specialists across the most in-demand technology stacks, focused on quality and cultural fit.
expertise.services_desc: From profile mapping to onboarding — we cover the full hiring cycle with precision.
expertise.approach_desc: Our proven methodology ensures consistent results and long-term partnerships.

industries_section.ind_headline: We connect tech talent across all major industries
industries_section.ind_desc: From fintech to healthcare, we provide validated Brazilian tech professionals to companies building the future in every sector.
industries_section.svc_headline: End-to-end hiring services tailored to your needs
industries_section.svc_desc: From the first profile to successful onboarding — our services cover every step of the hiring journey with precision and speed.
industries_section.sol_headline: Proprietary solutions that accelerate your hiring
industries_section.sol_desc: DEXO's methodology and tools are purpose-built to reduce time-to-hire, improve candidate quality, and build long-term talent partnerships.

about_page.headline: Connecting Talent, Building Teams
about_page.desc: DEXO was born from a simple mission: connect the brightest tech minds in Brazil with U.S. companies that demand excellence. With over 8 years of experience, we have become a trusted reference in global tech recruitment.
about_page.mission_desc: To be the most efficient and reliable bridge between Brazilian tech talent and U.S. companies, creating mutual growth opportunities.
about_page.vision_desc: A world where geographic boundaries do not limit access to exceptional talent.
about_page.team_desc: We combine deep knowledge of the Brazilian tech market with a full understanding of U.S. hiring standards. The result: precise matches, faster placements, and high-performance teams.
